send-sms.label: Send SMS
send-sms.description: Send SMS messages via Africa's Talking
send-sms.help: Sends an SMS message to a specified phone number using Africa's Talking gateway

wait-for-response.label: Wait for Response
wait-for-response.help: Waits for an incoming SMS from a user and routes to different outputs based on the response content

decision-maker.label: Decision Maker
decision-maker.help: Evaluates conditions and routes the message to different outputs based on the result
